prompt: A stark, high-contrast, black-and-white (monochromatic) side-profile portrait of a person emerging from absolute darkness. The figure is almost entirely a silhouette, defined solely by a very intense, narrow rim light (edge lighting) that traces the outline of their head, back, and arm. They are wearing a dark, form-fitting turtleneck, which completely disappears into the pure black background, emphasizing the glowing contour. The person is looking slightly upwards and to the side, conveying contemplation or a sense of aspiration. Details to Enhance Realism & Mood: Single, very hard, concentrated light source positioned directly behind and slightly to the side of the subject, creating a bright, glowing halo effect
